name: Vegetable Stuffed Round Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the round steak until very thin.
2. Rub the olive oil into the steak and sprinkle evenly with garlic salt and pepper.
3. Layer carrots, zucchini, and cheese down the center of the steak lengthwise.
4. Roll up the steak from the long side and tie together with four pieces of string using a meat rack if available.
5. Place the meat in the crockpot and cover with spaghetti sauce.
6. Cook on Low for 7-9 hours or High for 3-4 hours.
